repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Baptist Church of Avoca records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Baptist Church of Avoca (Avoca, N.Y.)

did.abstract: Two volumes including minutes of church meetings (1846-1868) and minutes of trustee meetings (1851-1918).

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Baptist Church of Avoca was first organized on January 13, 1847 in the home of Alexander Arnold. The church adopted the Declaration of Faith and Covenant which had been published by the New Hampshire Baptist State Convention. On August 13, 1847 the church was received into the Steuben Baptist Association. In 1852 a church was built. In March 1852 the church united with the Baptist Church in Cohocton.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Two volumes including minutes of church meetings (1846-1868) and minutes of trustee meetings (1851-1918).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Baptist Church of Avoca records, #6096. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections. Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Information obtained from these records may not be published or otherwise released in such form that any individual mentioned in the records can be identified.

controlaccess.geogname: Steuben County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Baptists -- New York (State) -- Avoca.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Avoca.

did.unittitle: Records of the Avoca Baptist Church. Minutes of Church Meetings,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The minutes of the church meetings are primarily concerned with the appointment of delegates, disciplinary problems among members, election of deacons appointment of a pastor, discussion of the pastor's salary, circulation of subscriptions, and the dismissal and acceptance of members. The minutes include the declaration of faith (sixteen Articles cited), the church covenant, lists of members, and a Table of contents. Items of interest:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A group of people met to organize the church. It was voted to adopt the declaration of faith and church covenant published by New Hampshire Baptist State Convocation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: It was resolved to petition for admission into the Steuben Baptist Association.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A difficulty was discussed between two church members concerning a financial matter.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Delegates were appointed to attend a meeting about the changing of the border which separates Steuben and Yates counties.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A unanimous vote united the church with the Baptist Church in Cohocton.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A disciplinary problem arose because of the violation of covenant and the slander of the church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A disciplinary problem concerning temperance was discussed (lasted until November 8, 1857).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A disciplinary problem concerning foul language was discussed.

did.unittitle: Records of the Baptist Society of Avoca, Steuben County, New York

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Trustee Meeting Minutes, 1851-1918 . The Trustee meeting minutes are primarily concerned with elections of trustees, clerks, and treasurer; the erection of a church building; the selling of pews; donations; and financial matters. The minutes include the constitution, cited in ten sections. Items of interest:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A committee was formed to locate a site for the construction of a meeting house.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A plot was located to build a church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A discussion of the structure of the church.
